info.title: MoonPlants API
info.description:
REST API for MoonPlants — smart plant monitoring and automated watering system. Consists of two namespaces:

- **`/api/v1/`** — User-facing endpoints (Supabase JWT auth)
- **`/api/iot/v1/`** — Device-facing endpoints (HMAC-SHA256 auth)

tags.name: Devices
tags.description: User-facing device management (list, claim, control light)

tags.name: Plants
tags.description: User-facing plant management (CRUD, measurements, predictions, watering)

tags.name: IoT Device
tags.description: Device-facing endpoints for ESP32 firmware (HMAC auth required)

deviceId.description: Optional: link to a claimed device

soilChannel.description: Device channel index (required when deviceId set)

perenualId.description: Perenual species ID to auto-fetch image/data

waterMl.description: Amount of water used in millilitres

BearerAuth.description: Supabase JWT access token. Pass via Authorization: Bearer <token>

IotHmac.name: X-Device-Signature
IotHmac.description:
HMAC-SHA256 device signature. IoT endpoints require all 5 headers: X-Device-Id, X-Device-Seq, X-Device-Timestamp, X-Content-SHA256, X-Device-Signature. Canonical string = METHOD
PATH
X-Device-Id
X-Device-Seq
X-Device-Timestamp
X-Content-SHA256

get.description: Returns all claimed devices owned by the authenticated user.
Returns device info, linked plants, and pending commands.

post.description: Links an unclaimed device to the authenticated user's account using the device's claim code.
Queues a LIGHT_ON or LIGHT_OFF command for the device. The device picks it up on next poll.

400.description: Invalid input or device does not support light

post.description: Swaps the linked device channels for two plants belonging to this device.
Unlinks the device from the user's account.
Creates a new plant and optionally links it to a device channel. If a Perenual ID is supplied, species data and image are auto-fetched.

400.description: Invalid input or channel out of range

get.description: Returns plant info, its linked species cache, latest measurement, and latest prediction.

delete.description: Permanently deletes the plant and all related measurements, predictions, and watering events (CASCADE).

get.description: Returns time-series measurements for the plant. Supports optional ISO date range filtering.
Runs the rule-based prediction model and returns the next watering recommendation.

post.description: Logs a manual watering event and updates last_watered_at on the plant.
Creates a PUMP_WATER device command. The system checks if watering is actually needed first. Returns commandCreated: false with a warning if watering is not recommended.

400.description: Plant not linked to device channel

get.description: Returns a list of user's plants that are not currently linked to any device channel.

post.description: Uploads a new photo for the plant.
ESP32 posts sensor data for all active channels. The server maps channels to plant_ids and stores measurements. Uses upsert on (device_id, seq, plant_id) for idempotency.

parameters.name: X-Device-Seq
parameters.description: Monotonic sequence counter stored in flash

parameters.name: X-Device-Timestamp
parameters.description: Current Unix epoch seconds (must be within ±120s of server time)

parameters.name: X-Content-SHA256
parameters.description: Hex SHA-256 of the request body (empty string for GET requests)

401.description: HMAC auth failed or missing headers

get.description: Returns queued commands for this device (PUMP_WATER, LIGHT_ON, LIGHT_OFF). Stale commands are expired automatically. Fetched commands are marked as 'sent'.

parameters.name: X-Device-Seq
parameters.description: Monotonic sequence counter stored in flash

parameters.name: X-Device-Timestamp
parameters.description: Current Unix epoch seconds (must be within ±120s of server time)

parameters.name: X-Content-SHA256
parameters.description: Hex SHA-256 of the request body (empty string for GET requests)

post.description: Device reports whether a command succeeded or failed. On successful PUMP_WATER ack, a watering_event is auto-created.

parameters.name: X-Device-Seq
parameters.description: Monotonic sequence counter stored in flash

parameters.name: X-Device-Timestamp
parameters.description: Current Unix epoch seconds (must be within ±120s of server time)

parameters.name: X-Content-SHA256
parameters.description: Hex SHA-256 of the request body (empty string for GET requests)

get.description: Returns the device's current configuration: claimed status, channel→plant mapping, measurement and command-poll intervals.

parameters.name: X-Device-Seq
parameters.description: Monotonic sequence counter stored in flash

parameters.name: X-Device-Timestamp
parameters.description: Current Unix epoch seconds (must be within ±120s of server time)

parameters.name: X-Content-SHA256
parameters.description: Hex SHA-256 of the request body (empty string for GET requests)

get.description: Searches the Perenual API for plant species by name. Returns a list of matches with ID, display name, and thumbnail image URL.
Triggers the batch prediction and auto-watering sequence. Secured via CRON_SECRET.
